pi_items.source: OpenICE documentation and evidence files confirm 'Simulated' is a device category in the Device Category dropdown. Evidence docs explicitly state: 'Click "Create ICE Device Adapter" → Select "Simulated" → Select "Multiparameter Monitor" → Click "Start"'. Verified via https://www.openice.info/docs/2_supervisor.html and multiple evidence JSON files in evidence_docs directory.

Confirmed as valid device type in OpenICE. Evidence found in: (1) evidence_docs/README.md explicitly lists 'Multiparameter Monitor' as the device type to select, (2) multiple evidence JSON files (icu_monitoring_setup_evidence.json, clinical_app_tour_evidence.json, fault_tolerance_test_evidence.json) reference 'Multiparameter Monitor device adapter created', (3) OpenICE is a real open-source project (https://github.com/mdpnp/mdpnp) developed by MD PnP Program at Massachusetts General Hospital that supports simulated patient monitors as verified by https://www.openice.info/docs/ documentation.

Task description and evidence documents confirm that the task requires creating a single simulated device. The task.json description states: 'Click on "Create an ICE Device Adapter" button to open the device creation dialog... Click the "Start" button to create the device adapter.' The verifier requires at least 1 device (min_device_count from metadata) and checks for device_windows > 0 or device_evidence. The evidence JSON files show successful task completion with 1 multiparameter monitor created.

privileged_info_summary: OpenICE is a real, open-source medical device interoperability platform developed by the MD PnP Program at Massachusetts General Hospital (https://github.com/mdpnp/mdpnp). The task requires creating a simulated medical device adapter with Device Category 'Simulated' and Device Type 'Multiparameter Monitor', which are verified as legitimate options in the OpenICE Supervisor application. The minimum device count required is 1. The vital signs data generated by the simulated device is synthetic, not real patient data, as it is generated by the simulated multiparameter monitor component of OpenICE.
